title: Disable DBFS root and mounts is in Public Preview
body: You can now disable access to the [Databricks Filesystem (DBFS) root](/aws/en/dbfs#dbfs-root) and [mounts](/aws/en/dbfs#mount-object-storage) in existing Databricks workspaces. See [Disable access to DBFS root and mounts in your existing Databricks workspace](/aws/en/dbfs/disable-dbfs-root-mounts).

ref_links.text: Disable access to DBFS root and mounts in your existing Databricks workspace
